title: Cricket’s House on Jaya
description: Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Masira, Mont Blanc Cricket, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Aghhhh! They've come to kill us!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: What did you do to our boss!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So you guys live here too?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: We usually sleep on our own ships.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why're they getting along so well?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Got something in common, I guess.

summary: Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.
